dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes waiting for 3+ indicator confirmation before entry to avoid premature entry. Implemented using ADX (trend strength), price vs SMA (direction), and MACD (momentum confirmation). ADX threshold of 25+ ensures trend initiation. Exit triggers on first reversal of MACD signal to enforce the 'any 2 of 3 indicators reverse' rule with conservative approach. The confirmation_bars_minimum of 2 bars is handled by backtest engine bar-by-bar processing.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes waiting for 3+ indicator confirmation before entry to avoid premature entry. Implemented using ADX (trend strength), price vs SMA (direction), and MACD (momentum confirmation). ADX threshold of 25+ ensures trend initiation. Exit triggers on first reversal of MACD signal to enforce the 'any 2 of 3 indicators reverse' rule with conservative approach. The confirmation_bars_minimum of 2 bars is handled by backtest engine bar-by-bar processing.

source_rule_text: A trader should wait for technical indicators to confirm trend direction before entering, rather than entering impulsively based on market movement alone, to avoid losses from premature entry.
